plain_english_summary: Deterministic speech-prosody encoding lane, currently in private-stage proof status with lane verdict FAIL.
commercial_wedge: For speech-technology and voice-analytics teams who may eventually need deterministic, reproducible encoding of prosodic features. Business value: auditability and reproducibility in speech analysis — lane not yet cleared.
technical_wedge: Deterministic 8-primitive encoding applied to speech-prosody signals. PRO-C001 through PRO-C004 PASS, PRO-C005 PAUSED_EXTERNAL, PRO-C006 FAIL. Retrieval closure below threshold.
ideal_first_buyer: Speech-technology or voice-analytics infrastructure team needing deterministic prosodic signal encoding (future — not current).
deployment_model: Python package (pip install -e '.[dev]'), private staged. FastAPI wrapper available via .[api] extra. Not distributed as a public package.
proof_anchors: PRO-C001 PASS: core codec round-trip fidelity
PRO-C003 PASS: prosodic feature extraction fidelity
PRO-C004 PASS: unit test and integration coverage
not_claimed: PRO-C005 PAUSED_EXTERNAL — blocked on external dependency
PRO-C006 FAIL — retrieval closure below threshold
family_position: Validates ZPE encoding applicability to speech-prosody signal domains. Lane verdict FAIL. Staged/validation tier alongside Neuro, Mocap, and Bio.
